rules.title: Transmural scar but RWMA reported as absent
rules.trigger: Scar_transmural_gt50 == TRUE AND RWMA_known == TRUE AND RWMA_present == FALSE
rules.message: High transmural scar is described, but RWMA is reported as absent. Check segmental correlation, slice selection, and whether RWMA text is up to date.

rules.title: Preserved EF with reduced longitudinal function
rules.message: Preserved LVEF with reduced longitudinal shortening suggests early/subclinical dysfunction, dyssynchrony, or regional tethering. Correlate with LGE/RWMA and ECG (LBBB).

rules.title: Reduced EF with preserved MAPSE
rules.message: Reduced LVEF with preserved longitudinal function can reflect predominant radial/circumferential impairment, loading effects, or measurement discordance. Review volumes, rhythm, and contouring.

rules.title: Marked septal–lateral MAPSE disparity
rules.message: Marked septal–lateral longitudinal disparity can reflect dyssynchrony (including LBBB), regional scar, or tethering. Ensure you comment on correlation with LGE and RWMA.

rules.title: Moderate/severe MR with no LA remodelling
rules.trigger: MR_known == TRUE AND (MR_grade == "moderate" OR MR_grade == "severe") AND LA_known == TRUE AND LA_enlarged == FALSE
rules.message: Clinically significant MR is suggested, but LA indexed volume is not enlarged. Consider loading conditions, chronicity, rhythm, and method concordance (volumetric vs flow).

rules.title: Aortic RF mismatch between reported and derived
rules.message: Reported aortic regurgitant fraction and the value derived from forward/backward flow differ materially. Check plane position, background correction, and arrhythmia effects.

rules.title: LGE present: ensure distribution and viability statement
rules.message: LGE is present. Ensure the report states pattern (ischaemic vs non-ischaemic), distribution (territory/segments), and viability implication when transmurality is high.

rules.title: Mapping abnormality: ensure diffuse vs regional interpretation
rules.trigger: (T1_high == TRUE OR ECV_high == TRUE OR T2_high == TRUE)
rules.message: Abnormal tissue mapping is detected. Ensure you describe whether changes are diffuse vs regional and provide a focused differential consistent with LGE and clinical context.

rules.title: Multi-territory ischaemic scar pattern
rules.message: Findings support a multi-territory ischaemic scar phenotype. Consider stating likely multivessel disease substrate and ensure territory naming is consistent with segment mapping.

rules.title: Ischaemic scar with limited recovery likelihood
rules.message: Transmurality exceeds 50% in at least one region, indicating low likelihood of functional recovery in matching dysfunctional segments. Include a clear viability statement.

rules.title: Non-ischaemic scar pattern suggested
rules.message: Non-ischaemic LGE features are suggested by narrative patterning. Ensure the report states distribution (mid-wall/subepicardial/insertion) and links to differential diagnosis.

rules.title: Inflammatory phenotype (raised T2 with non-ischaemic pattern)
rules.message: Non-ischaemic LGE with raised T2 supports active inflammation (for example myocarditis), depending on distribution and clinical context. Ensure you state activity markers and distribution.

rules.title: Diffuse fibrosis phenotype (ECV high without focal LGE)
rules.message: Raised ECV without focal LGE suggests diffuse interstitial expansion (fibrosis/infiltration) rather than focal scar. Ensure the differential is specific and phenotype-aligned.

rules.title: Infiltrative phenotype prompt (LVH + high T1/ECV)
rules.trigger: LVH == TRUE AND (T1_high == TRUE OR ECV_high == TRUE)
rules.message: LVH with elevated native T1/ECV suggests an infiltrative or fibrotic phenotype (for example amyloid in the right context). Ensure you explicitly frame this as a phenotype prompt.

rules.title: RV pressure-load phenotype (dilatation + systolic impairment)
rules.message: RV dilatation with reduced RVEF suggests significant pressure/volume loading. Ensure you comment on severity and integrate with flow/valves if present.

rules.title: Biatrial remod reinforces chronicity
rules.trigger: LA_known == TRUE AND RA_known == TRUE AND LA_enlarged == TRUE AND RA_enlarged == TRUE
rules.message: Biatrial enlargement supports chronic elevation of filling pressures or longstanding haemodynamic load. Ensure this is integrated with valve disease and ventricular filling.

rules.title: Low output with preserved LVEF
rules.message: CI/SVi is below reference despite preserved LVEF. Consider HFpEF/bradycardia/preload or recheck LV output measures; ensure this is acknowledged.

rules.title: Severely reduced LVEF without low-output physiology
rules.message: Severely reduced LVEF but CI/SVi are not low. Recheck EF or flow measures (units/indexing/contours) and reconcile physiology.

rules.title: Normal global MAPSE but reduced lateral MAPSE
rules.message: Lateral MAPSE is reduced despite normal global MAPSE. Consider regional longitudinal dysfunction or measurement disparity; consider commenting if clinically relevant.

rules.title: Marked septal-lateral MAPSE disparity
rules.message: Marked septal-lateral MAPSE disparity (>=6 mm). Check tracking/landmarks and consider reporting the disparity if genuine.

rules.title: Severe LV dilatation without significant MR/AR
rules.trigger: LVEDVi_size == "severe" AND MR_known == TRUE AND MR_sev < 2 AND AR_known == TRUE AND AR_sev < 2
rules.message: Severely dilated LVEDVi without moderate/severe MR or AR. Consider alternative drivers (DCM/shunt/athlete) or recheck regurg quantification.

rules.title: Moderate/severe MR with normal LVEDVi
rules.message: Moderate/severe MR with normal LVEDVi. Consider acute MR/underestimation/thresholds; recheck MR quantification and indexing.

rules.title: Moderate/severe AR with normal LVEDVi
rules.message: Moderate/severe AR with normal LVEDVi. Consider acute AR/quantification error; recheck backward/forward flow and RF calculation.

rules.title: Moderate/severe TR with no RA enlargement
rules.trigger: TR_sev >= 2 AND RA_known == TRUE AND RA_enlarged == FALSE
rules.message: Moderate/severe TR but RA is not enlarged. Consider acute TR, measurement error, or discordant indices; verify RA and TR quantification.

rules.title: Moderate/severe TR with no RV dilatation
rules.message: Moderate/severe TR without RV dilatation. Consider acute TR/measurement error or non-volume mechanisms; verify RV size and TR quantification.

rules.title: RV dilated with no significant TR
rules.trigger: RV_dilated == TRUE AND TR_known == TRUE AND TR_sev == 0
rules.message: RV dilatation without significant TR. Consider other causes (shunt/PR/pulmonary hypertension) and ensure RV size is contextualised.

rules.title: RV systolic impairment with normal TAPSE
rules.message: RV systolic impairment (by RVEF reference) with normal TAPSE. Reconcile measures (slice selection, tracking, rhythm) and consider reporting discordance.

rules.title: LVH with elevated ECV
rules.message: LVH with elevated ECV suggests diffuse fibrosis/infiltrative physiology; ensure tissue characterisation interpretation is explicit.

rules.title: LVH with high native T1
rules.message: LVH with high native T1 raises infiltrative/diffuse fibrosis considerations; ensure the report interpretation reflects this.

rules.title: High ECV without LGE
rules.message: High ECV with absent LGE suggests diffuse interstitial expansion (fibrosis/infiltration) rather than focal scar; ensure this is reflected in interpretation.

rules.title: High T1 and ECV without LGE
rules.trigger: T1_high == TRUE AND ECV_high == TRUE AND LGE_present == FALSE
rules.message: High native T1 and ECV without LGE suggests diffuse myocardial process; ensure interpretation goes beyond “no LGE”.

rules.title: High T2 without LGE
rules.message: High T2 with no LGE may indicate oedema without established scar; consider myocarditis/acute injury and ensure this is interpreted.

rules.title: Non-ischaemic LGE with high T2
rules.message: Non-ischaemic LGE with high T2 supports active inflammatory/injury physiology; ensure the activity implication is stated where appropriate.

rules.title: Ischaemic LGE with preserved EF and no RWMA
rules.trigger: LGE_ischaemic_pattern == TRUE AND RWMA_known == TRUE AND RWMA_present == FALSE AND LVEF_band == "normal"
rules.message: Ischaemic-pattern LGE with preserved EF and no RWMA may represent small/remote infarct; ensure scar presence and territory implications are clearly stated.

rules.title: High transmurality with RWMA absent
rules.trigger: Scar_transmural_max_pct >= 75 AND RWMA_known == TRUE AND RWMA_present == FALSE
rules.message: Very high transmural scar burden with RWMA absent is unusual. Recheck segment scoring/territory mapping and RWMA assessment.

rules.title: Transmural scar but preserved LVEF
rules.message: Transmural scar with preserved global LVEF may still be correct (small territory) but warrants careful territory/scar burden description.

rules.title: Aortic backward flow exceeds forward flow
rules.message: Aortic backward flow exceeding forward flow is physiologically implausible. Check plane placement, aliasing, sign convention, and units.

rules.title: Aortic regurgitant fraction outside 0–100%
rules.message: Aortic regurgitant fraction outside 0–100% suggests calculation/sign/unit error; recheck forward/backward flow.

rules.title: MR regurgitant fraction outside 0–100%
rules.message: MR regurgitant fraction outside 0–100% suggests unit or extraction error; recheck source parameter.

rules.title: TR regurgitant fraction outside 0–100%
rules.message: TR regurgitant fraction outside 0–100% suggests unit or extraction error; recheck source parameter.

rules.title: LV dilatation with preserved EF and no significant MR/AR
rules.trigger: LVEDVi_size == "moderate" AND LVEF_band == "normal" AND MR_known == TRUE AND MR_sev == 0 AND AR_known == TRUE AND AR_sev == 0
rules.message: LV is dilated with preserved EF without significant MR/AR; consider other causes (athlete/DCM/shunt) and ensure context is stated.

rules.title: Reduced LVEDVi with moderate/severe MR
rules.message: Moderate/severe MR with reduced LVEDVi is discordant; recheck LV volumes/indexing and MR quantification.

rules.title: LA enlargement with no significant MR but LVH present
rules.trigger: LA_enlarged == TRUE AND MR_known == TRUE AND MR_sev == 0 AND LVH == TRUE
rules.message: LA enlargement without significant MR in the setting of LVH suggests chronically elevated filling pressures; consider noting HFpEF/diastolic implications where appropriate.

rules.title: Aortic RF mismatch flag present
rules.message: Aortic regurgitant fraction differs materially from backward/forward flow-derived RF. Recheck which RF you intend to report and ensure consistency.

rules.title: Moderate/severe TR with no RA enlargement and no RV dilatation
rules.trigger: TR_sev >= 2 AND RA_known == TRUE AND RA_enlarged == FALSE AND RV_dilated == FALSE
rules.message: Moderate/severe TR without expected right-sided remodelling. Consider acute TR or quantification/segmentation error; verify RA/RV and TR measures.

rules.title: High ECV with LVH
rules.message: LVH with high ECV increases suspicion for infiltrative/diffuse fibrosis; ensure tissue interpretation is explicit and clinically framed.
